questionHtml:
Which spectra would show the difference between propan-2-ol, CH3CH(OH)CH3, and propanal, CH3CH2CHO?

I.   mass
II.  infrared
III. 1H NMR

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which spectra would show the difference between propan-2-ol, CH3CH(OH)CH3, and propanal, CH3CH2CHO? I. massII. infraredIII. 1H NMR A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III
